title: cPanel nav locked to platform super-admin only
description:
SaaS cPanel sidebar no longer shows Platform updates, Server, PipeShare, PipeSync, or Account to workspace purchasers or other sign-ins. Only Mike Strickland (PipeShare platform super-admin) sees the full operator menu.

Backend adds platformCpanelSuperAdmin on session capabilities. Frontend filters nav to Home, Billing, and Setup for everyone else. Server and Platform updates pages redirect unauthorized users to Home.

Who is affected: all pipeshare.net cPanel users except platform super-admin. Log out and back in after deploy to refresh session capabilities.
changeLog: Add platformCpanelSuperAdmin capability for Mike-only cPanel operator nav.
Hide Platform updates, Server, PipeShare, PipeSync, and Account from SaaS purchasers.
Guard Server and Platform updates pages against direct URL access.
Fix role badge so purchasers never show Horizon admin.
